{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032123084820BB89E6570FB372BC7B"}"},"total":41},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7552506345852093246","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还行，就是有点无聊。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758458162,"group_id":"7550309135091256344","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"阅读时长一万多小时，不信看主页","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+CUlcgwzfMiQ4ycgI81vl8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/573204679f7f42d4bdcc72f422585f59~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614901&x-signature=hASvkfNCyakQvUIBq%2FvfUPiycAA%3D","user_id":"615372653596304","user_name":"爱修仙的包总"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"615372653596304","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7550309135091256344","book_info":{"abstract":"主角魔都社畜一枚，日常被地铁踩鞋、老板 PUA，座右铭“多管闲事多赔钱”。某天，他被《多元宇宙本源》融合，能无限制穿越任何影视剧和小说，随时穿越，体内生成小宇宙，拥有无限空间，技能时间静止一开，反派集体摆拍。
我们的口号是——让我们一起拯救女主吧！
前面因新开书写得有点差强人意，但是又不能删除，大家介意的话可以跳过前面一两卷，不会影响剧情内容。

注：每个世界都相互有点联系，但关联不大，不影响跳读，喜欢情节的可以从第一卷《射雕英雄传》开始阅读，喜欢意难平的可以从第二卷《都挺好》开始阅读，喜欢无厘头搞笑的可以从第三卷《西虹市首富》或者从自己感兴趣的故事开始开始阅读，个人认为《死神来了》还稍微写得比较满意，如果喜欢女频文，喜欢宫斗的可以从第七卷《甄嬛传》开始阅读，总会有读者大大喜欢的。

这本书写穿越情节描写写得比较多，基本穿越一个影视剧都比较长，如果喜欢爽或者节奏快的可以去看另一本小说《我的逆天山寨手机》。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/p2oaa2d81c586e18903e4ef0fc10f4d53ad~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"碎梦无泪","author_id":"","book_id":"7550309135091256344","book_name":"快穿：我能穿越任何影视小说世界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#384048","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1578人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7550311729079517720","read_count":"1578","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4489535"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"1322","tags":"男频衍生,衍生,同人,武侠,系统,穿书,多女主,穿越,诸天万界,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-r
